meaning: Audio Modem Riser,声音和调制解调器插卡
examples: AMR increases the costs of health care.
Restore the original caller's AMR and LR values.
AMR hampers the control of infectious diseases.
What about the pensions of the thousands of employees who held AMR Corp. stock?
On Wednesday, United and AMR Corporation, parent of American Airlines, each announced 20, 000 cuts.
